title: Colorful Leaves!
description: The mod that adds 16 different colored leaves!
body:
![All 16 Color Variants!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83a06bc195cc8f3fd152c339bd5eb4e9e290a49.png)

Have you ever wanted colored leaves to be added to Minecraft? Can't find the right leaves for your builds? Well you are in luck! This mod adds **16 different color leaves** to the game!

## How to obtain:
Add the dye of your choosing, and then combine it with any leaf block to get a colored version of oak leaves! That's it!

This is mod is GREAT for both creative and survival mode!

![Example Use Case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b895a6cfa8e3d254e9c8dd96e152838f57b15c81_0.webp)

**Send me your creations with this mod on my Twitter/X: @IzzyIs__**

**Please report any bugs via the Github link / Bug tracker link.**

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/C0C51K5T37)
